revisedPrompt:
Create one raster PNG image.

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: Open Dungeon right sidebar category icon
Primary request: Images category icon: an enchanted framed painting tile showing a tiny torchlit dungeon doorway and a glowing magic spark, dungeon-era fantasy tabletop feel, warm highlights, chunky hand-painted RPG app icon style, matching a dark stone dungeon door icon vibe.
Scene/backdrop: simple dark stone vignette only, no full scene beyond the small framed image.
Subject: centered single framed picture object containing a tiny amber-lit dungeon doorway and one glowing magic spark.
Style/medium: painterly game UI icon, chunky hand-painted fantasy RPG app icon, crisp silhouette, readable at small size, no text.
Composition/framing: square icon, centered framed painting tile, generous padding, strong silhouette, clean icon readability.
Lighting/mood: amber torch glow with a faint violet magic edge, charcoal stone shadows, enchanted dungeon-era tabletop mood.
Color palette: charcoal stone, warm amber highlights, subtle violet magical glow.
Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no camera, no modern UI, no full scene beyond the small framed image.
